description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Tests that runs every Sunday at 7AM UTC and allows manual dispatch. The workflow uses self-hosted Linux runners with specific labels to build gem5 and run very-long tests in a containerized environment. It checks out the develop branch, builds gem5, uploads the build artifact, and then runs various types of very-long tests in parallel, each in its own job with a 3-day timeout, and uploads test results as zip files.
